title: Success + Happiness Quote
excerpt: After hearing this quote while watching a video on Karlie Kloss's YouTube channel , I had to script it. Of course I also had to look up how to spell his last name too. It's amazing how much truth is…
body:
After hearing this quote while watching a video on Karlie Kloss's YouTube channel, I had to script it. Of course I also had to look up how to spell his last name too. It's amazing how much truth is evident in these words.

Still trying to spread more love and motivation for each of your Mondays this year. I'm still using this watercolor set from Michaels and I got a new brush from a local art supply store, and found the same Princeton Select brush online at Joann. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!

In case you missed it, I have some of my favorite quotes scanned in and available as printable PDF's in the shop! Thank you for being wonderful, cutie!
